name: Cloudflare DNS
description: Cloudflare DNS provides authoritative DNS services with DDoS protection and global anycast. Manage DNS records (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.), configure DNSSEC, import/export zone files, run batch operations, and access DNS query analytics.

capabilities.name: dns_records_list
capabilities.description: List, search, sort, and filter DNS records for a zone.

capabilities.name: dns_records_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific DNS record by ID.

capabilities.name: dns_records_create
capabilities.description: Create a new DNS record in a zone.

capabilities.name: dns_records_update
capabilities.description: Overwrite an existing DNS record entirely.

capabilities.name: dns_records_patch
capabilities.description: Partially update an existing DNS record.

capabilities.name: dns_records_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a DNS record from a zone.

capabilities.name: dns_records_batch
capabilities.description: Execute batched create, update, and delete operations in a single call.

capabilities.name: dns_records_export
capabilities.description: Export DNS records as a BIND zone file.

capabilities.name: dns_records_import
capabilities.description: Import DNS records from a BIND zone file.

capabilities.name: dns_records_scan
capabilities.description: Trigger asynchronous DNS record discovery for a zone.

capabilities.name: dns_analytics_report
capabilities.description: Retrieve summarized DNS query analytics and aggregate metrics.

capabilities.name: dns_analytics_report_bytime
capabilities.description: Retrieve DNS analytics grouped by time interval for trend analysis.

capabilities.name: dnssec_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve DNSSEC status and configuration for a zone.

capabilities.name: dnssec_update
capabilities.description: Enable or disable DNSSEC for a zone.

capabilities.name: dnssec_delete
capabilities.description: Delete DNSSEC configuration and signing keys for a zone.

capabilities.name: dns_settings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve DNS settings for a zone.

capabilities.name: dns_settings_update
capabilities.description: Modify DNS settings for a zone.
